description: Perform a technical audit of the Chinook media catalog to identify high-fidelity audio tracks using the SQLite database at /home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db (Connection name: 'Chinook'). Create a Database View named v_track_bitrates that calculates the bitrate in kbps for every track using the formula: (Bytes * 8) / Milliseconds. The view must include columns: TrackId, Name, Composer, MediaType (joined from media_types), Genre (joined from genres), and BitrateKbps (rounded to nearest integer), excluding all video files. Export a list of all tracks with a bitrate strictly greater than 280 kbps to /home/ga/Documents/exports/hifi_candidates.csv. Write a SQL query to find the Top 5 Genres by average bitrate and save it to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/genre_quality.sql.
